title: F1 Race Control Message
description: Pub/Sub message for f1-race-control topic — flags, penalties, track status.

race_id.description: Unique race identifier, e.g. 2026_Australian Grand Prix.

flag.description: Flag colour / type, e.g. GREEN, YELLOW, RED, CHEQUERED, CLEAR.

scope.description: Whether the flag applies to the whole track, a specific driver, or a sector.

driver_id.description: Three-letter driver abbreviation if message is driver-scoped.

lap_number.description: Lap number when the message was issued.
